Document:
# COFFEEHOUSE-CLASS RESTAURANT SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Small
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1-2
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Plasma
# Shuttle Brief
"A small and comfortable café ship to lounge in. It contains all the supplies you might need to make accompanying desserts and dishes, ready to brew the best coffee, tea, and chocolate in the galaxy."
[italic]Brought to you by Settler's Spacecraft Firm.[/italic]
# Ship Functions ## Ship Buttons
# Food and Drinks
[bold][color=#a4885c]________________________________________________________________________[/color]
## Brewing Coffee
No.
Icon
Step
1
Plant coffee seeds and harvest some coffee beans.
2
Take the coffee beans and bake it for 5 seconds in an oven.
3
Put it inside a grinder and grind it into a fine powder.
4
Mix it with water, 1:5 ratio of coffee grounds to water for maximum coffee extraction without diluting it.
5
Take your coffee ground mixed with water and bake it in the oven till it brews, the more coffee you bake at once, the longer it takes.
6
Pour the hot coffee inside a mug or a cup and enjoy!
[bold][color=#a4885c]__________[/color]
## Other Brews
Other brews with similar method to brewing coffee.
[color=#a4885c]Tea:[/color] 1:5 ratio of tea to water.
[color=#a4885c]Hot Cocoa:[/color] 1:1 ratio of cocoa powder to water
[bold][color=#a4885c]__________[/color]

# Piloting ### Piloting Equipment Specifications: [color=#a4885c]Thrusters:[/color] [bold]6 Standard[/bold] [color=#999999](2 Forward, 2 Backward, 1 Left, 1 Right.)[/color]
[color=#a4885c]Gyroscopes:[/color] [bold]1 Standard[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]This shuttle is equipped with a thruster/gyroscope switch, check the ship functions section.[/color]
[bold][color=#a4885c]__________[/color]

Sector

# Hiring crew
- [textlink="For details on the process of Hiring, click here." link="Hiring"/]
[color=#a4885c] As a Captain of a Nanotrasen vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will. [/color]
### Recommended Positions: [color=#a4885c]Barista:[/color] Brew and serves drinks for customers.
[color=#a4885c]Botanist:[/color] Grows and harvests ingredients for drinks, such as coffee beans and tea leaves.
[bold][color=#a4885c]________________________________________________________________________[/color]
# Fuel and Power
Optimal [bold]Target Power[/bold] (kW)
Fuel Mileage
20 [bold]kW[/bold]
[bold]45[/bold] Minutes Per [bold]30[/bold] [color=#E03FD8]Plasma[/color] Fuel
[bold][color=#a4885c]________________________________________________________________________[/color]
